{{CargoRelic
|name=Aladdin's Lamp
|rank=SS
|affct=FTH
|birthday=04-14
|source=* Grandmaster Scrolls (1%), Lottery Machine (0.12%), Relic Forge (100 Relic RF), Wishing (0.08%)
* Altar Value Pack II ($49.99)
|description=On Apr 14, 617 AD, Aladdin from the East found a magic lamp. On this day, Aladdin was trapped in a cave. He took out the magic lamp and rubbed it in desperation and summoned a genie. The genie guided him home. In the lamp he stole from the cave, an all-powerful genie awaits his master's call at any time. By the genie's help, Aladdin became rich and powerful enough to marry the princess. Later, the genie built a palace for Aladdin, which is more magnificent than the emperor's palace.
|fame=75
|art=49
|fth=104
|civ=65
|tech=54
|ss1=Snail ATK +20<br>B-tad rewards from offering +0.8%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +4<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss2=Snail ATK +30<br>B-tad rewards from offering +1.2%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +6<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss3=Snail ATK +40<br>B-tad rewards from offering +1.6%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +8<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss4=Snail ATK +60<br>B-tad rewards from offering +2.4%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +12<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss5=Snail ATK +80<br>B-tad rewards from offering +3.2%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +16<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss6=Snail ATK +110<br>B-tad rewards from offering +4.4%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +22<br>Gods Descended: 30/30
|ss7=Snail ATK +110<br>B-tad rewards from offering +4.4%<br>Per Altar God Descent, Snail ATK +22<br>Gods Descended: 30/30<br>Snail ATK +100 (Awakened)
|skill1={{Skills|quarry|output|30}}
|skill2={{Skills|quarry|fth|15}}
|skill3={{Skills|bharata|def|600}}
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|Aladdin's Lamp}}
}}

[[Category:Bharata Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Bharata Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Offering Reward Boost]]
[[Category:Rewards Wish Coin]]
